sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هَدِيَّةُ عِيدِ مِيلَادِ رَنَا مَلْفُوفَةً بِوَرَقٍ أَزْرَقَ.
sentences.translation: Ranin poklon za rođendan bio je umotan u plavi papir.
sentences.translationEn: Rana's birthday gift was wrapped in blue paper.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَيْهِ اسْمُ مَنْ أَرْسَلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Na njemu nije bilo imena onoga ko ga je poslao.
sentences.translationEn: There was no name of who sent it on it.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ رَنَا الْهَدِيَّةَ وَوَجَدَتْ كِتَابَ قِصَصٍ.
sentences.translation: Rana je otvorila poklon i pronašla knjigu priča.
sentences.translationEn: Rana opened the gift and found a storybook.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ قَدْ قَالَتْ قَبْلَ أُسْبُوعٍ أَنَّهَا تُرِيدُ هَذَا الْكِتَابَ.
sentences.translation: Sedmicu ranije je rekla da želi tu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: She had said a week before that she wanted this book.

sentences.arabic: عَرَفَتْ أَنَّ أَخَاهَا الَّذِي يَسْمَعُ جَيِّدًا هُوَ مَنْ أَرْسَلَهَا.
sentences.translation: Shvatila je da ju je poslao njen brat koji dobro sluša.
sentences.translationEn: She realised that her brother who listens well had sent it.
